headline: Does Church & Dwight (CHD) Offer Value After Mixed Returns And DCF Upside?
summary: If you are wondering whether Church & Dwight at around US$95.75 is offering fair value or not, a good starting point is to compare the recent share performance with what current valuation metrics are indicating. The stock has returned 2.4% over the past week, is down 1.2% over the past month, and sits at a 15.9% gain year to date, with a 0.2% return over the last year. Taken together, this gives a mixed picture of momentum and sentiment. Recent coverage has focused on Church & Dwight as a...

headline: Are Wall Street Analysts Predicting Church & Dwight Stock Will Climb or Sink?
summary: Church & Dwight has underperformed the broader market over the past year, but analysts are cautiously optimistic about the stock’s prospects.
